problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
hypothesis: Combining Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
